title: Tantrums & Meltdowns
description: Strategies for managing emotional outbursts at different ages.

resources.title: Understanding the Science Behind Tantrums
resources.description: Learn what's happening in your child's brain during emotional outbursts and why they happen.
resources.content: When children experience tantrums, their brain's emotional center (amygdala) becomes highly activated...

resources.title: Toddler Tantrums vs. Preschooler Meltdowns
resources.description: Different approaches for different developmental stages.
resources.content: While tantrums might look similar at different ages, the underlying causes and best responses can vary significantly...

resources.title: Creating a Calming Bedtime Routine
resources.description: Step-by-step guide to establishing a peaceful bedtime routine.
resources.content: A consistent bedtime routine helps signal to your child's brain that it's time to wind down...
